stemHtml: How is separation achieved between an aircraft being radar-vectored and other aircraft joining the approach sequence?

options.a: By sequencing them in their order of approach.
options.b: ATC applies lateral separation between the aircraft.
options.c: The vectored aircraft is kept 1000 ft vertically separated within RVSM airspace.
options.d: The vectored aircraft maintains 1000 ft below other traffic in RVSM airspace.
